name: JoAi: Create Skill

description.en: Add a new skill to your agent, giving it specialized knowledge or a defined capability it can call upon.
description.de: Füge deinem Agenten eine neue Fähigkeit hinzu und gib ihm spezialisiertes Wissen oder eine definierte Fähigkeit, die er nutzen kann.
description.es: Add a new skill to your agent, giving it specialized knowledge or a defined capability it can call upon.
description.fr: Add a new skill to your agent, giving it specialized knowledge or a defined capability it can call upon.
description.ro: Add a new skill to your agent, giving it specialized knowledge or a defined capability it can call upon.
description.it: Add a new skill to your agent, giving it specialized knowledge or a defined capability it can call upon.

bot: Use this when the user wants to teach their agent a new skill or capability. The content should describe what the agent should do or know.

description.en: A short name for this skill
description.de: Ein kurzer Name für diese Fähigkeit
description.es: A short name for this skill
description.fr: A short name for this skill
description.ro: A short name for this skill
description.it: A short name for this skill

inputs.bot: A concise name that identifies this skill (e.g., 'Write cold emails', 'Summarize meetings').

inputs.name: Description
inputs.bot: A brief description of when and how this skill should be used.

inputs.name: Content

description.en: The instructions or knowledge that define this skill
description.de: Die Anweisungen oder das Wissen, das diese Fähigkeit definiert
description.es: The instructions or knowledge that define this skill
description.fr: The instructions or knowledge that define this skill
description.ro: The instructions or knowledge that define this skill
description.it: The instructions or knowledge that define this skill

inputs.bot: Detailed instructions, templates, or knowledge that the agent should use when applying this skill.
